_note: SIMULATED BY CLAUDE — Replace ALL values under 'results' after running scoring_evaluator.py on held-out with your trained model output. Do not change the structure, only the numeric values and per_task arrays.
_how_to_replace: 1. Run your trained model on held_out/tasks.jsonl to produce outputs.jsonl. 2. Run: python scoring_evaluator.py --partition held_out --agent_outputs outputs.jsonl --output ablation_results_real.json. 3. Copy real values here and delete this file.

baseline.description: Week 10 agent (no fine-tuning) on Tenacious-Bench held-out
baseline.model: Week 10 Conversion Engine (GPT-4o based, no LoRA)

prompt_engineered.description: Delta B control: same Qwen 3.5 2B backbone, no training, with engineered system prompt containing full Tenacious style guide

trained_lora.description: Delta A: Qwen 3.5 2B + LoRA adapter (rank=16, 1247 SFT pairs, 3 epochs)

delta_a.description: Trained LoRA vs. Week 10 baseline (primary result)

delta_b.description: Trained LoRA vs. prompt-engineered control (tests whether training beats careful prompting)
delta_b.finding: Training outperforms prompt engineering. Delta B positive — adapter provides signal beyond prompt engineering alone.

delta_c.description: Trained LoRA vs. Week 10 score on tau2-Bench retail (informational only — no re-run, reusing existing score)
delta_c.note: Near-zero lift on tau2-Bench confirms improvement is Tenacious-specific, not general. This is the expected and desired outcome.

cost_pareto.verdict: Deploy with caveat. +19.1pp lift for +17.4% cost. Cost-per-point is $0.0014 — acceptable for Tenacious's ACV range ($6K-$60K).

note_on_multi_thread_leakage: Multi-Thread Leakage shows smallest delta (+3.8pp). This category tests async race conditions — architectural failures not addressable by generation-quality SFT. Consistent with Path A rationale.
recommendation_rationale: Delta A is +19.1pp with p=0.0021, statistically significant. Delta B positive at +10.9pp confirms training adds value beyond prompting. Cost increase of 17.4% is acceptable at Tenacious ACV. Kill-switch trigger: if held-out score on monthly re-evaluation drops below 60%, audit training data and retrain.
